name: io.moderne.devcenter.BucketedMetricCard
displayName: DevCenter card from a data table column
description: Read rows from a previously emitted data table, aggregate a numeric column across all rows for this repository, and bucket the result into ordinal DevCenter measures.
options: [{"name":"inputDataTable","type":"String","displayName":"Input data table","description":"The fully qualified class name of the data table to read rows from. This data table is expected to be populated by another recipe earlier in the same recipe list.","example":"io.moderne.organizations.table.ClassCohesion","required":true},{"name":"cardName","type":"String","displayName":"Card name","description":"The display name of this DevCenter card.","example":"Class cohesion (LCOM4)","required":true},{"name":"column","type":"String","displayName":"Column","description":"The numeric column of the input data table to feed into the aggregation function.","example":"lcom4","required":true},{"name":"aggregation","type":"AggregationFunction","displayName":"Aggregation","description":"How to reduce the column's values across all rows in the repository to a single representative value before bucketing. `MIN`, `MAX`, `SUM`, and `AVERAGE` operate on numeric values of the column. `COUNT` returns the number of rows the upstream data table emitted for this repository, regardless of column value. `UNIQUE` returns the number of distinct non-null values of the column. Matching is case-insensitive.","example":"AVERAGE","valid":["MIN","MAX","SUM","AVERAGE","COUNT","UNIQUE"],"required":true},{"name":"buckets","type":"Bucket[]","displayName":"Buckets","description":"Ordered list of buckets. Each bucket has a `name` and an inclusive lower bound `moreThan` — a value is considered to fall into the bucket when `value >= moreThan`. When multiple buckets apply, the one with the largest `moreThan` wins. The list order defines the DevCenter measure ordinal: the first bucket maps to ordinal `0`, the last to ordinal `size - 1`. This lets callers control which end of the scale the visualization renders as \"worst\" (lowest ordinal) versus \"best\" (highest ordinal).","example":"[{\"name\": \"LOW\", \"moreThan\": 10}, {\"name\": \"MEDIUM\", \"moreThan\": 3}, {\"name\": \"HIGH\", \"moreThan\": 0}]","required":true}]

name: io.moderne.devcenter.ClassCohesionDevCenter
description:
A DevCenter that finds class quality metrics for repositories
and buckets the average LCOM4 (Lack of Cohesion of Methods, version 4)
into HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW cohesion categories.
dataTables: [{"name":"io.moderne.prethink.table.ClassQualityMetrics","displayName":"Class quality metrics","instanceName":"Class quality metrics","description":"Per-class code quality metrics including WMC, LCOM4, TCC, CBO, and maintainability index.","columns":[{"name":"sourcePath","type":"String","displayName":"Source path","description":"The path to the source file containing the class."},{"name":"className","type":"String","displayName":"Class name","description":"The fully qualified name of the class."},{"name":"lineCount","type":"int","displayName":"Line count","description":"Number of lines in the class."},{"name":"methodCount","type":"int","displayName":"Method count","description":"Number of methods defined in the class."},{"name":"fieldCount","type":"int","displayName":"Field count","description":"Number of fields defined in the class."},{"name":"wmc","type":"int","displayName":"WMC","description":"Weighted Methods per Class: sum of cyclomatic complexities of all methods."},{"name":"lcom4","type":"int","displayName":"LCOM4","description":"Lack of Cohesion of Methods (Hitz-Montazeri): number of connected components in the method-field access graph. 1 = cohesive, >1 = should be split."},{"name":"tcc","type":"double","displayName":"TCC","description":"Tight Class Cohesion: proportion of directly connected method pairs (sharing field access). 0.0-1.0, higher is more cohesive."},{"name":"cbo","type":"int","displayName":"CBO","description":"Coupling Between Objects: number of distinct classes this class is coupled to."},{"name":"maintainabilityIndex","type":"double","displayName":"Maintainability index","description":"Composite score (0-100) combining Halstead Volume, cyclomatic complexity, and LOC. Higher is more maintainable."}]},{"name":"io.moderne.prethink.table.TestGaps","displayName":"Test gaps","instanceName":"Test gaps","description":"Public non-trivial methods that have no test coverage, ranked by risk score.","columns":[{"name":"sourcePath","type":"String","displayName":"Source path","description":"The path to the source file containing the untested method."},{"name":"className","type":"String","displayName":"Class name","description":"The fully qualified name of the class."},{"name":"methodName","type":"String","displayName":"Method name","description":"The simple name of the untested method."},{"name":"methodSignature","type":"String","displayName":"Method signature","description":"The full method signature."},{"name":"cyclomaticComplexity","type":"int","displayName":"Cyclomatic complexity","description":"The cyclomatic complexity of the untested method."},{"name":"riskScore","type":"int","displayName":"Risk score","description":"Risk score combining complexity and architectural centrality (call count). Higher = more critical gap."},{"name":"gapReason","type":"String","displayName":"Gap reason","description":"Why this gap matters, e.g., 'complexity 15, called by 8 methods, no test coverage'."},{"name":"suggestedTestClass","type":"String","displayName":"Suggested test class","description":"Suggested fully qualified name for the test class."}]},{"name":"io.moderne.devcenter.table.UpgradesAndMigrations","displayName":"Upgrades and migrations","instanceName":"Upgrades and migrations","description":"Progress towards organizational objectives on library or language migrations and upgrades.","columns":[{"name":"card","type":"String","displayName":"Card","description":"The display name of the DevCenter card"},{"name":"ordinal","type":"int","displayName":"Ordinal","description":"The ordinal position of this value relative to other values."},{"name":"value","type":"String","displayName":"Value","description":"The display value of the current state of this repository."},{"name":"currentMinimumVersion","type":"String","displayName":"Minimum version","description":"The minimum matching version that is currently in use."}]}]

name: io.moderne.devcenter.DevCenterStarter
description:
This is a default DevCenter configuration that can be used as a starting point for your own DevCenter configuration. It includes a combination of upgrades, migrations, and security fixes. You can customize this configuration to suit your needs.
For more information on how to customize your DevCenter configuration, see the [DevCenter documentation](https://docs.moderne.io/administrator-documentation/moderne-platform/how-to-guides/recipe-based-devcenter-beta/).

This recipe is a starter card to reveal common OWASP Top 10 issues in your source code. You can customize this configuration to suit your needs.
For more information on how to customize your DevCenter configuration, see the [DevCenter documentation](https://docs.moderne.io/administrator-documentation/moderne-platform/how-to-guides/recipe-based-devcenter-beta/).

name: io.moderne.devcenter.eol.DevCenterDockerEndOfLife
displayName: DevCenter: Docker base image end of life
description: A DevCenter configuration that tracks the end-of-life status of Docker base images used in Dockerfile FROM instructions, sourced from a Moderne EOL feed. Images are matched on the leading version of their tag; codename tags (e.g. `debian:bullseye`) cannot be version-matched. Supply your own feed with the `feed` option to track internal images — see `FEED-FORMAT.md`.

name: io.moderne.devcenter.eol.DevCenterEndOfLife
description: A DevCenter configuration that tracks the end-of-life status of dependencies and language runtimes across major tech stacks (JVM, npm, NuGet, and Java/Node.js/.NET runtimes), sourced from a Moderne EOL feed. Copy this recipe to your own repository to customize card names, the approaching window, or the feed.

name: io.moderne.devcenter.eol.RuntimeEndOfLife
description: Determine the end-of-life status of an organization's language runtimes (Java, Node.js, .NET), sourced from a Moderne EOL feed.
